reviews.review_description: Game play is fun but aim needs work and more levels also need bots when no one is online please  fun game to have

reviews.review_title: Would love to actually get to play it
reviews.review_description: There are literally no players on this game.  Therefore,  I have the choice of joining a room.......which there are none cause nobody is playing it.....OR I can Host my own game and wait on other players...............which never join cause NOBODY IS PLAYING IT!!!   Hell, put in some BOTS or something and let us play that until someone comes along.  ANYTHING!!  Otherwise,  it may just be $5, but it's $5 for NOTHING!!!
